conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt the strongest connection with D because we bonded over the shared grind of working hard to support our families, which made our motivations feel deeply aligned. I also felt a solid bond with C and G, as we explicitly discussed forming an alliance and watching each other's backs once the game begins. In contrast, I felt the least connected to B, as our conversation was relatively brief and didn't move much beyond surface-level pleasantries compared to my other interactions.

I made explicit agreements to stick together and keep each other in the loop with C and G, and I also expressed an openness to looking out for J. I trust D the most because of our high connection score and shared personal background, but I am staying cautious of the group as a whole since the pressure of the prize money can change people. I feel confident that my small circle of allies will help me stay grounded as the game kicks off.
